forbidden.name: no-kernel-to-primitives
forbidden.comment: L0 kernel cannot import from L1 primitives — ADR-002 dependency rule

forbidden.name: no-kernel-to-packs
forbidden.comment: L0 kernel cannot import from L2 packs — ADR-002 dependency rule

forbidden.name: no-kernel-to-apps
forbidden.comment: L0 kernel cannot import from L3 shells — ADR-002 dependency rule

forbidden.name: no-primitives-to-packs
forbidden.comment: L1 primitives cannot import from L2 packs — ADR-002 dependency rule

forbidden.name: no-primitives-to-apps
forbidden.comment: L1 primitives cannot import from L3 shells — ADR-002 dependency rule

forbidden.name: no-packs-to-apps
forbidden.comment: L2 packs cannot import from L3 shells — ADR-002 dependency rule

forbidden.name: no-cross-pack
forbidden.comment: Packs cannot depend on other packs — each is a separate Bounded Context per ADR-004

forbidden.name: no-ui-to-business
forbidden.comment: UI primitives stay pack-neutral; importing kernel/pack code into ui breaks reusability
